debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
inst✝ : NeZero n
⊢ IsCyclic ↥(rootsOfUnity n Circle)

proof:
let e := Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv n
    exact isCyclic_of_surjective e.symm e.symm.surjective
failed_attempts:
let e := Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv n
    exact IsCyclic.of_surjective e.symm e.symm.surjective

have : IsCyclic (rootsOfUnity n ℂ) := (Complex.isPrimitiveRoot_exp n (NeZero.ne n)).isCyclic
    exact isCyclic_of_surjective (Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv n).symm (MulEquiv.surjective _)

have : IsCyclic (rootsOfUnity n ℂ) :=
      (Complex.isPrimitiveRoot_exp n (NeZero.ne n)).isCyclic_rootsOfUnity
    exact IsCyclic.of_equiv _ (Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv n)

let e := Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv n
    exact IsCyclic.of_surjective e.symm e.symm.surjective

have : IsCyclic (rootsOfUnity n ℂ) :=
      IsPrimitiveRoot.isCyclic_rootsOfUnity (Complex.isPrimitiveRoot_exp n (NeZero.ne n)) (NeZero.ne n)
    exact IsCyclic.of_surjective (Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv n).symm (MulEquiv.surjective _)

haveI : IsCyclic (rootsOfUnity n ℂ) := HasEnoughRootsOfUnity.cyc
    exact isCyclic_of_mulEquiv (Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv n).symm

refine IsCyclic.of_surjective (Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv n).symm (MulEquiv.surjective _)
    exact (Complex.isPrimitiveRoot_exp n (NeZero.ne n)).isCyclic_rootsOfUnity

let e := Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv n
    exact IsCyclic.of_surjective e.symm e.symm.surjective
successful_attempts:
let e := Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv n
    exact isCyclic_of_surjective e.symm e.symm.surjective
